prompt: A young Korean woman wears a terracotta swimsuit with a warm copper veil draped asymmetrically across one shoulder. Golden hour backlight rims her silhouette in warm orange, close-up profile shot, eye level, soft warm glow on her cheek and neck, desert horizon glowing dimly out of focus behind her. Vertical portrait orientation, 2:3 aspect ratio. Render with photographic realism: subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, avoid over-smoothed CG textures. Skin: subsurface scattering and micro-texture. Hair: subtle natural imperfection.
promptEn: A young Korean woman wears a terracotta swimsuit with a warm copper veil draped asymmetrically across one shoulder. Golden hour backlight rims her silhouette in warm orange, close-up profile shot, eye level, soft warm glow on her cheek and neck, desert horizon glowing dimly out of focus behind her. Vertical portrait orientation, 2:3 aspect ratio. Render with photographic realism: subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, avoid over-smoothed CG textures. Skin: subsurface scattering and micro-texture. Hair: subtle natural imperfection.
promptZh: 一位 年轻韩国女性 穿着一件 赤陶色泳装，搭配暖铜色面纱，面纱不对称地披在单肩上。黄金时刻的逆光在她的轮廓边缘勾勒出温暖的橙色光晕，近景侧面特写，平视视角，脸颊和颈部带有柔和的暖光，背景是模糊的沙漠地平线。竖构图肖像，2:3 宽高比。渲染要求：具备摄影级写实感，阴影区域带有细微的 ISO 400 胶片颗粒，避免过度平滑的 CG 质感。皮肤：呈现次表面散射和微纹理。头发：保留细微的自然瑕疵。
